creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey,

Thanks for submitting this update.

1) Would you like to maintain inspircd 2.0.2 ? I've just reset the 
maintainer for inactivity.

2) Please would you replace the pkg-install script with a USERS/GROUPS 
line in the Makefile? An example is now in the current inspircd port.

It might be as simple as changing the version number/distinfo with a 
couple of plist tweaks, is that how you made this shar?

If you need any help, please don't hesitate to ask me.

Chris

-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.
